texto: I have all these things that I want to say to her, like... Like how I can tell she's a lonely person, even if other people can't. Cause I know what it feels like to be lost and lonely and invisible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Richard Ayoade: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I have all these things that I want to say to her, like... Like how I can tell she's a lonely per…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, invisible, loneliness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de loneliness e lost.

texto: Even so-called 'short novels' are pretty long and can take several hours to read, so make sure you stay hydrated. I like to keep an isotonic sports drink handy if I'm going to be reading for any longer than forty minutes. I'll also take regular breaks and make sure I'm wearing loose-fitting clothing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Richard Ayoade: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “Even so-called 'short novels' are pretty long and can take several hours to read, so make sure yo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, books, reading pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor e reading.

I like to keep an isotonic sports drink handy if I'm going to be reading for any longer than forty minutes. I'll also take regular breaks and make sure I'm wearing loose-fitting clothing.

texto: A lot of comedies are based on the reaction shot. You have one person doing something stupid and one person is generally the straight man, and the laughs generally come on the reaction of the straight man to the funny thing the other person has done.
explicacao: Citação de Richard Ayoade sobre temas ligados a humor. “A lot of comedies are based on the reaction shot. You have one person doing something stupid and …” articula humor, man, stupid em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como stupid e you.
